items.content_html: An Obsidian plugin that displays all open notes in a tab group as a single continuous document (sometimes called "Scrivenings mode"). Features arrow navigation between notes, reorder notes with drag-and-drop of tab headers.
items.title: gasparschott/obsidian-continuous-mode: An Obsidian plugin that displays all open notes in a tab group as a single continuous document (sometimes called "Scrivenings mode"). Features arrow navigation between notes, reorder notes with drag-and-drop of tab headers.
